Intercom partnered with Stripe to implement a novel pricing model focused on the value users derive from Fin.

proposal.reason: The source describes a concrete AI-relevant event: the release of a RISC-V CPU IP (TT-Ascalon S) by Tenstorrent, which is explicitly stated to be optimized for agentic AI workloads.

claims.subject: TT-Ascalon S
claims.object: 单位面积性能达旗舰 IP 的 140%

evidence.quote: Tenstorrent 表示 TT-Ascalon S 面向代理式 AI ，针对智能体运行时那种混合型、分支密集、工具关联的典型执行模式进行了优化
Tenstorrent 当地时间昨日在日本东京举行的 TT-Deploy JP 大会上发布了 RISC-V CPU 内核设计 TT-Ascalon S
TT-Ascalon S 以旗舰核心 Ascalon X 一半的面积实现了后者 70% 的性能 ，带来了 1.4 倍的单位面积性能。

proposal.reason: The source describes a concrete AI-relevant hardware deployment by Meta involving a custom ASIC for memory pooling, which is used for AI inference workloads.

evidence.quote: Meta 称，Vistara 已在超大规模基础设施中投入生产，覆盖数百万台服务器，并用于分离式机器学习推理、大数据处理、数据库、分布式缓存和 CI / CD 构建系统。
Meta 为此推出 Vistara ASIC 方案，通过符合 CXL 2.0/1.1 规范的 PCIe Gen5 x16 接口，把 DDR4 内存桥接到主机处理器。
论文给出的结果显示，该方案可将分离式机器学习推理的服务器数量最多减少 25%，并将分布式缓存的平均延迟降低 29%。

fields.value: Customers have moved past exploring what AI can do; they want to make it core to how they operate.

Customers leave AWS FDE deployments with both new solutions and new engineering capabilities. Along with agentic systems running in their own AWS environment, they gain lasting AI skills, workflows, and patterns they can use to innovate independently.
Deployments are structured around shared goals and business results, not billable hours.

AWS FDE embeds AWS frontier teams —working with purpose-built agents—directly inside customer teams. These experienced engineers, many of whom build our AWS AI services , partner with a customer’s business, engineering, and security teams

Customers have moved past exploring what AI can do; they want to make it core to how they operate. They want to recreate their business processes with agentic AI built in so they can increase productivity and deliver AI-powered products. I have also heard loud and clear that many customers need expert AI engineers working directly with their teams to help them build and become AI-native organizations.

value: customer data that never leaves the customer's governance framework
customer data that never leaves the customer's governance framework
Customers gain deployed systems, knowledge graphs, runbooks, architectural documentation, and trained internal champions ready to operate independently.

evidence.quote: Today, I'm excited to announce that we are meeting that demand by creating a dedicated AWS Forward Deployed Engineering (FDE) organization.

AWS FDE is built for organizations that have moved past experimentation and need production AI systems running real business processes—particularly in regulated industries, financial services, and government, where security, governance, and speed to production are non-negotiable.
Customers have moved past exploring what AI can do; they want to make it core to how they operate.

Customers leave AWS FDE deployments with both new solutions and new engineering capabilities. Along with agentic systems running in their own AWS environment, they gain lasting AI skills, workflows, and patterns they can use to innovate independently.
Deployments are structured around shared goals and business results, not billable hours.

AWS FDE embeds AWS frontier teams —working with purpose-built agents—directly inside customer teams. These experienced engineers, many of whom build our AWS AI services , partner with a customer’s business, engineering, and security teams to build and deploy production AI systems with their data, governance, and processes.

Customers have moved past exploring what AI can do; they want to make it core to how they operate. They want to recreate their business processes with agentic AI built in so they can increase productivity and deliver AI-powered products. I have also heard loud and clear that many customers need expert AI engineers working directly with their teams to help them build and become AI-native organizations.

At the heart of this is a semantic layer that FDE teams deploy into the customer's own AWS account. It connects to enterprise data sources, enriches metadata, and uses AI to publish a governed, versioned knowledge graph.
Security is built in from the start, as well: hardware-based isolation, end-to-end encryption, and customer data that never leaves the customer's governance framework.
Customers gain deployed systems, knowledge graphs, runbooks, architectural documentation, and trained internal champions ready to operate independently.

gate_results.detail: all proposal numbers occur in evidence

evidence.quote: Our expert Forward Deployment Engineers work side-by-side with your team to build, integrate, and deploy your custom Voice AI agents.
Skip the technical complexity—we handle everything!
Access Deepgram, Whisper, and other leading transcription engines through a single API. Our edge-hosted architecture lets you switch engines without rearchitecting your stack.

Rapid prototyping
Build working Voice AI demos in days using your real data and workflows. Our engineers create live prototypes that prove immediate value to stakeholders.
Full integration
We handle complex API connections, write custom code, and build seamless integrations so your Voice AI agents work perfectly with existing systems.
Long-term partnership
Our engineers stay embedded with your team beyond launch, providing ongoing training, support, and strategic guidance for continued success.
Production-ready
Everything we build goes live. From sandbox testing to full production deployment with monitoring, security, and proper routing configurations.
Complete handoff
Your team gets comprehensive documentation, admin training, and support onboarding so you can confidently run and expand your Voice AI agents.
Risk mitigation
We de-risk your Voice AI adoption by solving technical blockers before and after contract signing, ensuring smooth deployments and faster time-to-value.

fields.value: Use AI to supercharge your customer experience outcomes and propel your brand forward

value: Design for scalability from the start

evidence.quote: Implement AI for Customer Experience | Info-Tech Research Group
Technology Research
Use AI to supercharge your customer experience outcomes and propel your brand forward

Identify high-impact use cases early : zero in on specific CX metrics – like first-contact resolution or NPS – that resonate with leadership and deliver visible value to customers.
Design for scalability from the start: define your project scope with precision – pinpoint the specific CX challenges, establish robust requirements, account for governance, risk, and compliance considerations – and involve cross-functional stakeholders from the outset.
Monitor and adapt continuously: track key performance indicators and user feedback in real time, then refine AI capabilities to regularly stay aligned with shifting customer needs and strategic goals.
